title: Finance — counterparty (customer + supplier lookup)
description: Read-side normalized contact shape. Maps from Moneybird `Contact` per modules/finance/connectors/moneybird.md §5.5. Used as a lookup table when normalizing invoices and ledger entries; not rendered as a top-level entity.

name.description: Display string (Moneybird `company_name`, or `firstname + lastname` when no company name).

roles.description: Multi-role: a Moneybird contact can be both customer and supplier.
